title: primula longipes
intro: Primula longipes, also known as the long-stalked primrose, is a perennial alpine plant that belongs to the Primulaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Primula longipes include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support skin health. Primula longipes is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used in tincture or capsule form as a herbal supplement.
